classObjective: Solve systems of linear equations using elimination by addition or subtraction and recognize when adding or subtracting equations will eliminate a variable.
warmUp: What do you need to add to x + 2y = 8 to eliminate x?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: opposite coefficients; aligned equations; adding vs. subtracting equations; back-substitution
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice solving systems by elimination using addition and subtraction
independentPractice: Practice problems solving systems by elimination and recognizing when addition or subtraction will work
assessment: Exit ticket: solve by elimination: 3x + 2y = 16 and 3x - 2y = 4
capReflection: How can you tell whether to add or subtract two equations when using elimination?
